title: • Preservation of the original creative spark: a live system where no t
content:
• Preservation of the original creative spark: a live system where no two shows are ever the same.
  • Here are the missing elements reorganized under the categories Planning, Execution, and Governance for clarity:

  • Planning
  • Stakeholder Identification
    • List of all project stakeholders including main performer, rotating musicians, audience representatives, engineering teams, and partner organizations.
  • Budget and Resource Estimates
    • Estimated costs, required hardware/software, staffing, and time allocations for the prototype and future scaling.
  • Risk Assessment and Mitigation Plan
    • Identification of technical, creative, and security risks along with strategies for mitigation.
  • Success Metrics and KPIs
    • Measurable criteria for success, such as system reliability, audience engagement levels, and live show stability.
context: From document: Project Charter: Contextual Awareness and Audience-Interactive Live… — chunk 14 (chunk 14/15)
